configurations.name: ingestion-service
runtimeArgs: cd services/ingestion && pip install -q -r requirements.txt && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload

configurations.name: processing-service
runtimeArgs: cd services/processing && pip install -q -r requirements.txt && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload

configurations.name: alerts-service
runtimeArgs: cd services/alerts && pip install -q -r requirements.txt && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8003 --reload
